# cartridges/jambox/mobile/test/scale_colour_parity_test.dart

```dart
// D-G.5 â€” Scale-colour parity test.
//
// Loads the shared JSON fixture generated by the TypeScript colourForPitch
// function and asserts that the Dart port produces byte-for-byte identical
// output for every entry.
//
// Fixture: apps/world-apps/jam-room/src/colour/scale-colour-parity.json
// (generated by scripts/gen-scale-colour-parity.ts)

import 'dart:convert';
import 'dart:io';

import 'package:test/test.dart';

import '../lib/src/colour/scale_colour.dart';

void main() {
  late List<Map<String, dynamic>> entries;

  setUpAll(() {
    // Load the fixture from the shared path (relative to repo root).
    // When running from the Flutter project directory, the path is:
    // ../../jam-room/src/colour/scale-colour-parity.json
    final fixturePath = '${Directory.current.path}'
        '/../../jam-room/src/colour/scale-colour-parity.json';
    final file = File(fixturePath);
    if (!file.existsSync()) {
      // Fallback: also try from test/fixtures/ (copied at build time).
      final localPath =
          '${Directory.current.path}/test/fixtures/scale-colour-parity.json';
      final localFile = File(localPath);
      if (!localFile.existsSync()) {
        throw StateError(
          'scale-colour-parity.json not found.\n'
          'Run: bun run scripts/gen-scale-colour-parity.ts\n'
          'from apps/world-apps/jam-room/ to generate it.',
        );
      }
      final raw = json.decode(localFile.readAsStringSync()) as Map<String, dynamic>;
      entries = (raw['entries'] as List).cast<Map<String, dynamic>>();
      return;
    }
    final raw = json.decode(file.readAsStringSync()) as Map<String, dynamic>;
    entries = (raw['entries'] as List).cast<Map<String, dynamic>>();
  });

  test('fixture has at least 100 entries', () {
    expect(entries.length, greaterThanOrEqualTo(100));
  });

  test('colourForPitch Dart output matches TypeScript output for all entries',
      () {
    int checked = 0;
    for (final entry in entries) {
      final pitch = (entry['pitch'] as num).toInt();
      final scale = scaleIdFromJson(entry['scale'] as String);
      final root = (entry['root'] as num).toInt();
      final palette = paletteFromJson(entry['palette'] as String);
      final labelMode = labelModeFromJson(entry['labelMode'] as String);

      final dartSpec = colourForPitch(pitch, scale, root, palette, labelMode);

      final expectedHue = (entry['hue'] as num).toDouble();
      final expectedSat = (entry['saturation'] as num).toDouble();
      final expectedBri = (entry['brightness'] as num).toDouble();
      final expectedBorder = entry['border'] as String?;
      final expectedLabel = entry['label'] as String?;

      // Floating-point tolerance: the TS and Dart implementations use the
      // same arithmetic; results should match exactly (both use double
      // precision).  Allow 1e-9 epsilon for platform rounding differences.
      expect(
        dartSpec.hue,
        closeTo(expectedHue, 1e-9),
        reason: 'hue mismatch for pitch=$pitch scale=${entry['scale']} root=$root '
            'palette=${entry['palette']} labelMode=${entry['labelMode']}',
      );
      expect(
        dartSpec.saturation,
        closeTo(expectedSat, 1e-9),
        reason: 'saturation mismatch for pitch=$pitch scale=${entry['scale']}',
      );
      expect(
        dartSpec.brightness,
        closeTo(expectedBri, 1e-9),
        reason: 'brightness mismatch for pitch=$pitch scale=${entry['scale']}',
      );
      expect(
        dartSpec.border,
        equals(expectedBorder),
        reason: 'border mismatch for pitch=$pitch scale=${entry['scale']}',
      );
      expect(
        dartSpec.label,
        equals(expectedLabel),
        reason: 'label mismatch for pitch=$pitch scale=${entry['scale']} '
            'labelMode=${entry['labelMode']}',
      );

      checked++;
    }
    expect(checked, equals(entries.length));
  });

  test('classifyPitch matches scaleClass in fixture', () {
    for (final entry in entries) {
      final pitch = (entry['pitch'] as num).toInt();
      final scale = scaleIdFromJson(entry['scale'] as String);
      final root = (entry['root'] as num).toInt();
      final expectedClass = entry['scaleClass'] as String;

      final dartClass = classifyPitch(pitch, scale, root);
      final dartClassStr = switch (dartClass) {
        ScaleClass.root     => 'root',
        ScaleClass.inScale  => 'in-scale',
        ScaleClass.modal    => 'modal',
        ScaleClass.chromatic => 'chromatic',
      };

      expect(
        dartClassStr,
        equals(expectedClass),
        reason: 'classifyPitch mismatch for pitch=$pitch '
            'scale=${entry['scale']} root=$root',
      );
    }
  });
}
```
